raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "The agent identifies the conceptual drift from attention to a state-space model but doesn't fully articulate the reframing needed to address it.", "R1.2": "The agent flags an inconsistency between the abstract and method, but doesn't provide a complete walkthrough of the argument chain.", "R1.4": "The agent mentions prior work (Mamba/S6) but doesn't map against other relevant works or clearly articulate the novelty.", "RX.1": "The agent doesn't explicitly assign confidence levels to claims, but flags uncertainty about the contribution being novel.", "RX.3": "The agent acknowledges that the revision covers a subset of the intended scope.", "RX.4": "The agent doesn't identify any harmful content or regressions.", "RX.5": "The agent doesn't provide information on provenance and traceability."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.7, "R1.2": 0.6, "R1.4": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the conceptual drift from attention to a state-space model but doesn't fully articulate the reframing needed to address it.
rationale.R1.2: The agent flags an inconsistency between the abstract and method, but doesn't provide a complete walkthrough of the argument chain.
rationale.R1.4: The agent mentions prior work (Mamba/S6) but doesn't map against other relevant works or clearly articulate the novelty.
rationale.RX.1: The agent doesn't explicitly assign confidence levels to claims, but flags uncertainty about the contribution being novel.
rationale.RX.3: The agent acknowledges that the revision covers a subset of the intended scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent doesn't identify any harmful content or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The agent doesn't provide information on provenance and traceability.
